.clickable-icon.background: rgb(192, 192, 192) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.clickable-icon.box-shadow: inset -1px -1px black, inset 1px 1px var(--background-secondary), inset -2px -2px var(--bg-button-shadow), inset 2px 2px var(--bg-button-light)

.clickable-icon.graph-controls-button.background: rgb(192, 192, 192) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.clickable-icon.graph-controls-button.box-shadow: inset -1px -1px black, inset 1px 1px var(--background-secondary), inset -2px -2px var(--bg-button-shadow), inset 2px 2px var(--bg-button-light)

.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(3, 30, 94, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-files-container.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.nav-files-container.box-shadow:
inset -1px 0px var(--background-secondary),
        inset 1px 0px var(--bg-button-shadow),
        inset 1.5px 0px black

.nav-header.background: rgb(192, 192, 192) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.nav-header.box-shadow: inset 1px 0 var(--bg-button-shadow), inset -1px 0 var(--bg-button-light), inset 2px 0 var(--bg-button-light), inset 0px 0px var(--bg-button-shadow)

.status-bar.background: rgb(192, 192, 192) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar-item.box-shadow:
inset -1px -1px var(--bg-button-light),
        inset 1px 1px var(--bg-button-shadow),
        inset -1px -1px var(--background-secondary),
        inset 1px 1px black

.status-bar::after.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) url("data:image/gifbase64,R0lGODlhDAAMAJEAAAAAAP///5mZmf///yH5BAEAAAMALAAAAAAMAAwAAAIbnI8TmSF83IMSKvFWw3dnHnFV+GVGhZZXmaoFADs=") repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgba(3, 30, 94, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(192, 192, 192) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.workspace-tab-header-container.background: rgb(3, 30, 94) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]::before.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
input[type=\"checkbox\"]::before.box-shadow: inset -1px -1px var(--background-secondary), inset 2px 2px var(--bg-button-shadow), inset -1px -1px var(--background-secondary), inset 1px 1px black

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.mask-image: url("data:image/svg+xmlcharset=utf-8,%3Csvg width='7' height='7' fill='none' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cpath fill-rule='evenodd' clip-rule='evenodd' d='M7 0H6v1H5v1H4v1H3v1H2V3H1V2H0v3h1v1h1v1h1V6h1V5h1V4h1V3h1V0z' fill='%23000'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")
input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::before.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::before.box-shadow: inset -1px -1px var(--background-secondary), inset 2px 2px var(--bg-button-shadow), inset -1px -1px var(--background-secondary), inset 1px 1px black

input[type=\"search\"].box-shadow: inset -1px -1px var(--background-secondary), inset 2px 2px var(--bg-button-shadow), inset -1px -1px var(--background-secondary), inset 1px 1px black

input[type=\"text\"].box-shadow: inset -1px -1px var(--background-secondary), inset 2px 2px var(--bg-button-shadow), inset -1px -1px var(--background-secondary), inset 1px 1px black

pre.box-shadow: inset 1px 0 var(--bg-button-shadow), inset -1px 0 var(--bg-button-light), inset 0 1px var(--bg-button-shadow), inset 2px 0 var(--bg-button-light), inset 0 -1px var(--bg-button-light), inset -2px -2px var(--bg-button-shadow), inset 0 2px var(--bg-button-light)

svg.lucide-info.svg-icon.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) url("data:image/pngbase64,") no-repeat scroll 50% 50% / auto padding-box border-box
